title: Arkhalis | PvP
description: 32x PvP oriented texture pack, usable for Vanilla PVP, Neth & Dia Poth etc
body:
This Minecraft texture pack offers a refined visual experience while maintaining the game's core aesthetic. Key features include:

- **Detailed item icons**: Enhanced designs for tools, weapons, armor, and other inventory items.

- **Updated block textures**: Revamped appearances for wood, stone, and other common blocks.

- **Redesigned GUI elements**: Inventory slots and item frames with a more defined look.
- **Expanded color palette**: New shades and hues for various materials like gems and metals.

- **Improved tool and weapon designs**: More intricate detailing on axes, swords, bows, and other equipment.

- **32x textures**: Ores, ingots, and other resources with textures closer to their real-world counterparts.

# Showcase
